body:
## Summary
- add `--focus-static-ebook-footnote-hash-parity` to `scripts/validate-content.js`
- validate static ebook `#/ebook?c=...&fn=` / `&fnref=` links, scroll targets, and `data-source-counts` parity for Swedish and English chapters
- add routing/static ebook tests for the focused validator path

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-static-ebook-footnote-hash-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js tests/content-static-site-ebook-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "static ebook|footnote hash|source-counts|focus-static-ebook-footnote"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: Add focused static ebook footnote hash validator
